case_title: CHIASSON, JOHN P vs. GILPIN FAMILY TRUST DBA DIVA'S et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE RE: REQUST THAT THE CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT FILED DIVISON OF LABOR STATDARS ENFORECEMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIASSON, JOHN P AS TO DEFENDANT GILPIN FAMILY TRUST DBA DIVA'S GILPIN FAMILY TRUST DBA THE MOTHER LODE
